label: Roof
description: Defines a type of roof that can cover map cells. Controls collapse behavior, filth, and thickness.

isNatural.label: Is natural
isNatural.description: If true, this roof is a natural rock roof rather than a constructed one.

isThickRoof.label: Is thick roof
isThickRoof.description: If true, this roof is a thick rock roof that does not vanish on collapse.

collapseLeavingThingDef.label: Collapse leaving thing def
collapseLeavingThingDef.description: ThingDef spawned when this roof collapses.

filthLeaving.label: Filth leaving
filthLeaving.description: ThingDef used as the filth type left behind when this roof collapses.

soundPunchThrough.label: Sound punch through
soundPunchThrough.description: SoundDef played when something punches through this roof.

canCollapse.label: Can collapse
canCollapse.description: If true, this roof can collapse when the supporting walls are destroyed.
